def get_closest_vowel(word):
    """Given a word, find the closest vowel to the right that is between two consonants, ignoring vowels at the beginning and end. Return an empty string if no such vowel exists. The function is case-sensitive and assumes the input contains only English letters.

    get_closest_vowel("yogurt") ==> "u"
    get_closest_vowel("FULL") ==> "U"
    get_closest_vowel("quick") ==> ""
    get_closest_vowel("ab") ==> ""
